name: jira-claude-plugin
description: Crawl a Jira Kanban board into a document and backlog, then optionally hand off to superpowers to start the work.

jira_url.title: Jira site URL
jira_url.description: Your Jira Cloud site, e.g. https://your-domain.atlassian.net

jira_email.title: Jira account email
jira_email.description: Atlassian account email used for API authentication
